---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement or roadmap item
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that x-raft-lib doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they fall short.

## Notes

For non-trivial changes, please open this issue **before** sending a PR so we
can agree on scope (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)).
